## Summary

Briefly describe the goal of this PR.

## Change type

- [ ] `feat` (new feature)
- [ ] `fix` (bug fix)
- [ ] `refactor` (refactor)
- [ ] `style` (visual/style change)
- [ ] `docs` (documentation)
- [ ] `chore` (maintenance)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is objective and cohesive.
- [ ] Impacted flows were manually tested.
- [ ] No visual regressions introduced.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] No sensitive information was added.

## Evidence (optional)

Include screenshots, GIFs, or test notes.
